nasb.text: Indeed, He loves the people; All Your holy ones are in Your hand, And they followed in Your steps; Everyone receives of Your words.

esv.text: Yes, he loved his people, all his holy ones were in his hand; so they followed in your steps, receiving direction from you,

cnv.text: 他實在愛人民， 他的眾聖者都在你的手裡； 他們坐在你的腳前， 各自領受你的話。

ccb.text: 祂爱自己的子民， 众圣者都听命于祂， 伏在祂的脚前， 领受祂的训诲。
